originalTitle: Dragon Quest XII: Beyond Dreams - Official Reveal Trailer
content: Take a look at the reveal trailer for Dragon Quest 12: Beyond Dreams which was shown off during the Dragon Quest 40th anniversary update stream on May 27th, 2026 #dragonquest #dragonquestxii #dragonquest40 Follow our curator page on steam: https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/

chineseContent: 看看 2026 年 5 月 27 日勇者斗恶龙 40 周年更新直播中展示的《勇者斗恶龙 12：超越梦想》的预告片 #dragonquest #dragonquestxii #dragonquest40 在 Steam 上关注我们的策展人页面：https://store.steampowered.com/curator/6861411-GameSpot-Official/
